base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of octorok_walk_shoot — a character from 1986 legend of zelda. Octorok — red/blue octopus creature. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Octorok — red/blue octopus creature; 2-frame walk + 1 shoot-stone-pose per direction. Fires stone projectile that hits 1 HP damage. Easiest overworld enemy
